testcase.name: test_mark_event_complete
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_47_features.py:49: in test_mark_event_complete assert create_response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create event: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create event: {"detail":"CSRF token missing","error_code":"CSRF_MISSING"} E assert 403 in [200, 201] E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
